title: Marketing Analyst
description:
Soda has partnered with a leading German e-commerce business, a well-established digital brand continuing to scale and innovate across Europe! 🌍✨




They’re looking for a Marketing Analytics Lead to drive data-led decision making across their marketing function. This is a great opportunity for someone who enjoys owning analytics strategy, working closely with stakeholders, and leading data initiatives that directly impact growth.




Role: Marketing Analytics Lead

Location: Hamburg (1x per month in office)

 Salary: €100k




What You’ll Do

Lead and shape the marketing analytics strategy across key channels (paid, CRM, lifecycle, etc.)
Partner with marketing, product, and data teams to define KPIs and measure performance
Turn complex data into clear, actionable insights that drive campaign optimisation and business growth
Own and improve reporting, dashboards, and attribution models
Guide and support data analysts / cross-functional teams, ensuring high-quality delivery
Identify opportunities to improve customer segmentation, targeting, and ROI
Act as the bridge between technical data teams and business stakeholders




What You Bring

Experience in Marketing Analytics, Growth Analytics, or similar data-focused roles
Proven track record of leading data initiatives or mentoring analysts 
Comfortable working with data tools (e.g. SQL, BI tools, analytics platforms)
Excellent communication skills, with the ability to influence non-technical stakeholders
Commercial mindset with a passion for using data to drive growth




Interested? Don’t be shy—apply now! 🚀

About the company
Trust In SODA

Staffing and Recruiting  51-200 employees  91 on LinkedIn

We are community-led digital tech recruiters, delivering diverse talent and world-class customer experiences across the UK, Ireland, Germany, Switzerland, and the US. SODA are proud winners of the Best Technology Recruitment Agency, awarded by the British Recruitment Awards in November 2025.

We are proudly B Corp certified, joining a global network of organisations dedicated to using their platform as a force for positive change.

Operating out of Berlin, Boston, Dublin, London, and Zurich, the SODA team specialises in permanent and contract recruitment across Software Engineering, Cloud & Infrastructure, DevOps, Data, and Creative.

We are part of Trinnovo Group, united by a shared mission to build diversity, create inclusion, and encourage workplace innovation. Our communities are:

• Ex-Military Careers – Bridging the gap between the military and a meaningful civilian career
• Women in DevOps – Closing the DevOps gender gap and inspiring future leaders in tech
• Pride in Tech – Creating a kinder and safer space for queer people in technology

Our group awards and accreditations include:
